message:
test(fcp-core): pin ResumeCause + DuplicateDeliveryClass resume-grant variant matrix (flywheel_connectors-0axe1)

Bead asks for LeaseGrantStatus variants Display + serde tag pinning. No
type literally named LeaseGrantStatus exists in fcp-core. The closest
grant-shaped status enums in the lease/resume protocol are ResumeCause
at connector_state.rs:1069 (4-variant: under WHAT condition was a
lease/computation granted resumption) and DuplicateDeliveryClass at
connector_state.rs:1096 (5-variant: HOW the resume grant interacts
with prior partial work).

LeaseResponse (immediate grant verdict) is pinned in
lease_grant_display_serde.rs. ResumeOutcome / ResumeDisposition /
ResumeReasonCode pinned by registry_acceptance_variants.rs +
zone_event_serde_tag_matrix.rs. ResumeCause + DuplicateDeliveryClass
are residual — grep returns empty.

Coverage: 4-variant ResumeCause snake_case serde + label matches
wire form, 5-variant DuplicateDeliveryClass serde + label matches
wire form, CBOR Text-scalar shape per variant, PascalCase rejection
sentinels, distinct-variant serialization, cross-enum disjoint-token-space
sentinel (operator dashboards filter on both — accidentally converging
would silently merge two distinct status streams), 9 distinct tokens
total. Linear PartialEq grouping pattern (neither enum derives Hash —
pin canonical grouping pattern). Fresh-as-initial-default sentinel,
EvidenceConflict highest-severity distinct token, OperatorRepair
distinct from automatic Failover/CrashRecovery.

16 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-0axe1 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test lease_grant_status_variant_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
